title: Masters' Council (disambiguation)
content:
'''Masters' Council''' can refer to:

*[[Je'daii Council]]: The ruling body of the [[Je'daii Order]].
*[[Jedi High Council]]: The ruling body of the [[Jedi Order|Old Jedi Order]].
*[[Jedi High Council (New Jedi Order)]]: The ruling body of the [[New Jedi Order]].
{{Disambig}}
